framework: The Harness (Spec > Split > Execute > Verify > Iterate)

features.name: Project Scaffolding
features.description: TypeScript project structure, package.json, tsconfig, stub files for all modules.

features.name: API Integration
features.description: Anthropic SDK client, message sending (streaming + non-streaming), tool-aware API calls.

features.name: Tool System
features.description: read_file, write_file, edit_file, bash tools with registry and dispatcher.

features.name: Agent Loop
features.description: Core agentic loop: send → detect tool_use → execute → feed result back → repeat until text-only response.

features.name: Interactive REPL
features.description: Readline-based REPL with streaming output, markdown rendering, spinner, tool call display.

features.name: Context Management
features.description: Token tracking, compaction at 80% of 200k window, conversation summarization.

features.name: CLI & Error Handling
features.description: One-shot prompt mode, /help, /clear, Ctrl+C cancellation, friendly error messages.

features.name: README
features.description: Snarky educational README with architecture, setup instructions, and project philosophy.
